code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut value = 0
mut i = 0

while i <= n
  mut is_ws = true
  mut b = 0
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
      is_ws = true
    else
      is_ws = false
    end
  else
    is_ws = true
  end

  if is_ws
    if in_num
      let final_val = sign * value
      if final_val % 2 == 0
        if string.is_empty(evens)
          evens = "#{final_val}"
        else
          evens = "#{evens} #{final_val}"
        end
      else
        if string.is_empty(odds)
          odds = "#{final_val}"
        else
          odds = "#{odds} #{final_val}"
        end
      end
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      value = 0
    end
  else
    if b == 45 and not in_num
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43 and not in_num
      sign = 1
      in_num = true
    else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      in_num = true
      value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
